content: Vite + vite-plugin-pwa development pitfalls: (1) Service Worker is NOT generated in Vite dev server by default — devOptions.enabled:true must be set explicitly, otherwise testing SW behavior requires production builds. (2) HMR and Service Workers conflict: custom SW code cannot use import.meta.hot; must write plain browser JS/TS without HMR markers. (3) tsconfig: must add 'vite-plugin-pwa/client' to compilerOptions.types to get virtual module types (useRegisterSW etc.); missing this causes TS errors on import. (4) After a production build, the SW may serve a stale cached version even after redeployment — must implement an update prompt (onNeedRefresh callback) or users see old app. (5) SW precache manifest in dev mode is minimal and revision-hashed assets don't match dev assets, so offline testing must be done against production builds.
